name: BB:Threats: Scanning: Scan Low
notes: This Building Block identifies a low level of potential reconnaissance.
bb_references: BB:Threats: Scanning: Scan Low on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the flow type is one of Superflow A
when the number of local hosts is greater than than 500
TD_list: APPLY BB:Threats: Scanning: Scan Low on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the flow type is one of Superflow A
AND when the number of local hosts is greater than than 500
